## What changed


## Checklist
- [ ] `npm run validate` passes
- [ ] `npm run duplicates` passes
- [ ] New/changed resources have `en`/`hi`/`ta` name + description
- [ ] Every `official` resource references a registered `sourceId`
- [ ] Verification has a real recent `checkedAt` date (no fake green badges)
- [ ] Outdated resources marked via `lifecycle` (not deleted)
- [ ] Trust claims remain evidence-based (no "100% / every / all" overclaims)
